title: AME's Mobs
description: This mod added new mobs and bosses with animation
body:
This mod added new bosses and mobs to the game. For example ,Ender King. He is the king of enderman and he uses his staff to attack his enemys. He can smash the ground and create shockwaves ,he can summon shulker bullet meteor fall ,and mores. 

Mob List
**- Ender King** : You can summon him by crafting Ministeral Rune ,hold it in mainhand and hold End Crystal in offhand ,right click ,and after a seconds he'll be summoned. His abilities are staff sweep (drove himself forward and sweep his target) ,staff smash (use his staff to smash the ground creating a powerful shockwave) ,shulker bullet meteor fall ,combo (hit his target with staff 3 times continually) ,dash and stab ,when his health is below half ,he'll enter phase 2. In this phase he'll regenerate his hp faster making it harder to defeat. Lastly ,when it dies ,it'll drop Ender Spectre. The staff he uses. With this spectre you can force nearby Enderman to attack whatever you want and you can summon shulker bullet meteor fall by right clicking in the air. 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/74CbBtW5C-c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**- Ender Fiend** : You can find Ender Fiend naturally in the end. It is friendly unless you attack it first. You can tame Ender Fiend by using a fews Chorus Fruit ,once Ender Fiend is tamed ,you'll be able to ride them and even control it to Bite ,Scream ,and Stomp. You can control Ender Fiend to lay down or to follow you by pressing shift ,and right click at it. You can upgrade your Ender Fiend with Ender Fiend armor which can be crafted by using diamonds and shulker shell ,You can also increase Ender Fiend's maximum health from 50(25 heart) to 70(25 heart) by using Ender Fiend Booster. You can get Ender Fiend's Egg by right click at Adult Ender Fiend with Eye Of Ender. Once you got the egg ,right click at the ground and baby Ender Fiend will be hatched. You can't ride it until it is fully grown but you can easily make it fully grown by using only 7 chorus fruits! 
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/V0Ve4DWMank" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Note : please note that this mod is still not completed ,in the future more mobs ,bosses ,and items will be added. If you have any suggestions or bug reports ,feel free to let me know in the comment. I'll consider them. Thank you for downloading ,enjoy!
